/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/backend/arm/arm_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/backend/x86/x86_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/cli/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/driver/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/frontend/ast/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/frontend/lexer/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/frontend/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/frontend/parser/pratt_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/ast_to_metatron/ast_to_metatron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/cfg/cfg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/ir/ir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/metatron/ir/ast_to_metatron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/metatron/metatron_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/metatron_graph/metatron_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/optimizer/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/scheduler/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/symbol/symbol_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/types/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/middleend/typesystem/type_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sy.dir/src/runtime/runtime.cpp.o -o sy
